tutorial.first_build: [ES] Tap a building slot to construct your first building.
tutorial.draw_cards: [ES] Draw cards at the start of each turn.
tutorial.play_card: [ES] Tap a card, then tap a target to play it.
tutorial.energy: [ES] Cards cost energy. You regenerate {0} per turn.
tutorial.hero_summon: [ES] You've earned enough shards! Summon your new hero.
hero.lyra_thornveil.name: [ES] Lyra Thornveil
hero.lyra_thornveil.desc: [ES] A nature mage who weaves vines and thorns to protect allies.
hero.kael_ashwalker.name: [ES] Kael Ashwalker
hero.kael_ashwalker.desc: [ES] A fire sorcerer who channels the fury of the Ashen Wastes.
hero.thane_ironhold.name: [ES] Thane Ironhold
hero.thane_ironhold.desc: [ES] An armored defender of the Iron Legion, unbreakable in battle.
hero.zara_voidweaver.name: [ES] Zara Voidweaver
hero.zara_voidweaver.desc: [ES] A void mystic who bends shadow to confuse and weaken foes.
hero.rowan_stoneward.name: [ES] Rowan Stoneward
hero.rowan_stoneward.desc: [ES] A steadfast guardian with the strength of living stone.
hero.mira_frostbane.name: [ES] Mira Frostbane
hero.mira_frostbane.desc: [ES] An ice mage whose frost slows all who oppose her.
hero.vex_shadowstrike.name: [ES] Vex Shadowstrike
hero.vex_shadowstrike.desc: [ES] A shadow assassin who strikes from the darkness.
hero.sera_dawnblade.name: [ES] Sera Dawnblade
hero.sera_dawnblade.desc: [ES] A holy knight radiating divine light to heal and smite.
hero.grim_bonecrusher.name: [ES] Grim Bonecrusher
hero.grim_bonecrusher.desc: [ES] A berserker who grows stronger as battle rages.
hero.nyx_stormcaller.name: [ES] Nyx Stormcaller
hero.nyx_stormcaller.desc: [ES] A lightning mage who chains destruction across the field.
building.stronghold.name: [ES] Stronghold
building.stronghold.desc: [ES] The heart of your empire. Upgrade to unlock new districts.
building.barracks.name: [ES] Barracks
building.barracks.desc: [ES] Train soldiers to bolster your military might.
building.training_ground.name: [ES] Training Ground
building.watch_tower.name: [ES] Watch Tower
building.watch_tower.desc: [ES] Provides early warning of incoming attacks.
building.wall.name: [ES] Wall
building.armory.name: [ES] Armory
building.armory.desc: [ES] Stores weapons and armor for your troops.
building.stone_quarry.name: [ES] Stone Quarry
building.iron_mine.name: [ES] Iron Mine
building.iron_mine.desc: [ES] Mines iron ore from deep underground.
building.grain_farm.name: [ES] Grain Farm
building.grain_farm.desc: [ES] Cultivates grain to feed your people.
building.arcane_tower.name: [ES] Arcane Tower
building.arcane_tower.desc: [ES] Harnesses magical essence from the ley lines.
building.marketplace.name: [ES] Marketplace
building.marketplace.desc: [ES] Trade goods to boost your economy.
building.academy.name: [ES] Academy
building.academy.desc: [ES] Research technologies to advance your empire.
building.library.name: [ES] Library
building.laboratory.name: [ES] Laboratory
building.observatory.name: [ES] Observatory
building.observatory.desc: [ES] Study the stars for strategic advantage.
building.archive.name: [ES] Archive
building.hero_shrine.name: [ES] Hero Shrine
building.hero_shrine.desc: [ES] Honor fallen heroes to gain their blessing.
building.guild_hall.name: [ES] Guild Hall
building.guild_hall.desc: [ES] Coordinate with allies for joint operations.
building.enchanting_tower.name: [ES] Enchanting Tower
building.forge.name: [ES] Forge
building.forge.desc: [ES] Craft weapons and armor from raw materials.
building.embassy.name: [ES] Embassy
building.embassy.desc: [ES] Establish diplomatic ties with other alliances.
quest.daily.alliance_chat: [ES] Send a message in alliance chat

notif.come_back: [ES] Your troops miss you! Come back and claim resources.
event.void_rift.desc: [ES] Dark portals have opened across the land. Defeat the void creatures!
event.world_boss.desc: [ES] A mighty beast threatens the realm. Rally your alliance!
event.alliance_tournament.desc: [ES] Compete against other alliances for glory and rewards!
event.launch_celebration.desc: [ES] Celebrate the launch of Ashen Throne with bonus rewards!
